chosen_action.title: Principle 8 compliance: add reciprocal cross-links from 3 related posts back to Claude Code #54393 postmortem

why_this_action.summary: The new Claude Code #54393 postmortem blog (deployed 10:18 CEST) cross-linked to 3 related posts, but NONE of those 3 had reciprocal links back. This is a Principle 8 violation that creates duplicate-content risk: Google sees two posts covering overlapping tool sets with zero internal links as thin content. All 7 external lanes blocked. Measurement hold active until June 5. Fixing live SEO integrity is the highest-leverage autonomous action available.
blocking_factors_avoided: All 7 external distribution lanes structurally blocked (Reddit, HN, Lobsters, Dev.to, Apollo, PyPI, GitHub Discussions)
SO lane in cooldown + handoff packet already current
StackOverflow handoff packet already delivered for manual placement in current review window
Execution board says no truthful do-now packet
Hold window already contains active_loop_prompt_repair and post_hold_reentry_contract_repair

result.summary: Added reciprocal cross-links with differentiated purpose statements to all 3 related posts (composer, reliability, verification). Committed to Ralph-Site (aa93413), pushed to git.sellogic.ai, auto-deployed as release 20260603103212. All 3 reciprocal links verified live on ralphworkflow.com. IndexNow notified for all 3 updated URLs.

cross_links_added.composer_post: what happens when agents run overnight without a workflow composer
cross_links_added.reliability_post: absence of structured workflow contracts produced 12 distinct failure modes in a single overnight run
cross_links_added.verification_post: two of the 12 bugs were silent verification failures that these patterns are designed to catch
